workspace.title: Bilibili Download Workspace
workspace.subtitle: Bilibili video, series, and part downloads stay here; the danmaku child MOD is controlled separately.
workspace.placeholder:
Paste one Bilibili URL per line, for example:
https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV...
workspace.initial_preview: Enter a Bilibili video, series, or part URL to inspect and download in batches.
workspace.wrong_site: This workspace accepts only Bilibili URLs. Switch to the matching site workspace.

bilibili.name: Batch Download
bilibili.purpose: Videos, series, parts, and UP creator batch downloads

bilibili-search.name: Search
bilibili-search.purpose: Search public videos through the official Bilibili endpoint

bilibili-danmaku.name: Danmaku
bilibili-danmaku.purpose: Optionally retain XML, convert to ASS, or mux into MKV
